name: Codex Review Lifecycle Convergence
goal: Make the existing submit/review/rework lifecycle provider-neutral so a review-ready sequential or final parallel submission enters reviewing, A/B returns through mark_executing changed:true, and failed review reopens the exact batch atomically without a new MCP subsystem.

tasks.name: Bootstrap corrected lifecycle into its own review boundary
tasks.description: One atomic self-update task: add complete RED coverage, implement parallel-safe lifecycle ownership and strict read-only review contracts, pass focused and full gates, cachebust/build/reinstall/restart, verify same-task runtime, stage exact files, then submit Task 1 through the corrected live boundary. Splitting before reinstall would leave review on the old deadlocking runtime.

steps.description: Add RED transition/lifecycle tests: executing-to-reviewing edge; transaction-local persisted session stage must be executing and stale session-stage change rejects; sequential and final two-task parallel submission return review_ready:true, changed:true, same session_id, exact submitted batch, both gate fields, and exactly one task-context audit; first parallel submission returns review_ready:false/changed:false/executing with clear gates, same session, exact batch/remaining count, and one audit while sibling remains write-capable; pending unclaimed sibling does not delay sequential review; second submit reviewing plus invalid/stale task/count/empty rejection; informational neutrality; A/B real return with zero-submitted guard; C/D/F exact batch rework; claim_task reviewing rejection; get_next_tasks non-advancement; set_testing_theatre_checked succeeds in reviewing and changes only its flag plus one same-session audit; exact submit_task, claim_task, record_review_verdict, and mark_executing public descriptions. Add independent rollback triggers for intermediate/final submit task/session/audit, informational grade/audit, A/B grade/task/session/audit, and C/D/F grade/task/session/audit.
steps.expected: Only new lifecycle assertions fail; every rejected direct mutation leaves task/session/grade/audit snapshots unchanged.

steps.description: Create combined hook RED fixtures covering both hooks: executing pending block; reviewing git status --short, cat worker/skills/code-review/SKILL.md, and pytest commander/tests/test_code_review_skill.py -q pass; reviewing git-add dry-run/chaining plus docs/source Write/Edit/MultiEdit/NotebookEdit block with unchanged state/index; docs exception passes only brainstorming/design_ready/design_marked_for_use/plan_ready/plan_marked_for_use/final_plan_prep and blocks idle/debugging/plan_interrupted/execution_complete/reviewing; executing docs outside/inside allowed_files block/pass; stale gate native-session isolation with only review_pending/review_block_count allowed to change. Extend redundant code-review bridge zero-mutation snapshot.
steps.expected: Only current bypass and stage cases fail; characterization passes.
Only current docs/git-add review bypass cases fail.
Existing and redundant no-op cases pass.

steps.description: Add RED executing-plans tests for claim-all parallel dispatch, intermediate review_ready:false continuation, sequential/final review_ready:true batch review, A/B return, C/D/F batch rework, equal-target skip, and explicit no reset/replacement-task/raw-DB workaround.
steps.expected: New assertions describe exact orchestrator contract.
Only new exact lifecycle-guidance assertions fail.

steps.description: Create RED code-review skill tests requiring strict task-boundary read-only behavior, no AUTO-FIX, mandatory successful verdict persistence, A/B orchestrator return, C/D/F already-reopened rework without proceed/TODO choices, and informational standalone review.
steps.expected: New file contains exact review lifecycle assertions.
Only current code-review contract assertions fail.

steps.description: Implement existing lifecycle exactly: state-machine executing targets include reviewing; submit_task uses one transaction that re-reads persisted session by native ID and requires its actual stage executing before task re-read, sibling recount, and closure-captured response values; intermediate review_ready:false executing/no-gate branch; final/sequential branch passes transaction-local source stage to validateWorkflowTransition(source,'reviewing',...) before reviewing/gate updates; claim_task requires executing; get_next_tasks cannot advance during submitted review; record_review_verdict task-boundary calls require reviewing/nonempty set; set_testing_theatre_checked remains the allowed reviewing flag mutation; informational grade/audit only; A/B transaction-local batch advance/clear/preserve reviewing; mark_executing requires current-wave A/B plus zero submitted; C/D/F transition-local batch reopen/clear/return executing; update submit_task, claim_task, record_review_verdict, and mark_executing public descriptions; all write errors escape and roll back.
steps.expected: No new MCP tool, stage, helper API/subsystem, duplicate audit, stale-session acceptance, stale-grade return, reviewing claim, parallel interruption, or stale mutation input.

steps.description: Restrict docs whitelist to exactly brainstorming/design_ready/design_marked_for_use/plan_ready/plan_marked_for_use/final_plan_prep and generic non-executing git-add exception to non-reviewing; preserve reviewing read-only parser. Update executing-plans for parallel batch lifecycle and explicit no-workaround contract. Update code-review to strict read-only/fail-closed verdict persistence with A/B return and C/D/F atomic rework; preserve standalone informational review.
steps.expected: Review remains read-only across all tool routes; executing docs reach exact allowed_files; shipped skills agree with MCP lifecycle; unrelated guidance unchanged.
All focused lifecycle and rollback cases pass exact count.
All cases pass with redundant bridge zero mutation/audit.

steps.description: Apply exact plugin-creator cachebuster before final build.
steps.expected: Base 1.0.24 retained; one new +codex token newer than 1.0.24+codex.20260721013248.
ironclaude resolves to /Users/roberthyatt/Code/ironclaude/worker through confirmed local marketplace.

steps.description: Byte-compare every modified worker path and print exact restart oracle.
steps.command: node -e 'const fs=require("fs"),os=require("os"),path=require("path"),crypto=require("crypto");const sha=p=>crypto.createHash("sha256").update(fs.readFileSync(p)).digest("hex");const v=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json","utf8")).version;const root=path.join(os.homedir(),".codex/plugins/cache/ironclaude/ironclaude",v);const files=[".codex-plugin/plugin.json","mcp-servers/state-manager/dist/index.js","mcp-servers/state-manager/src/state-machine.ts","mcp-servers/state-manager/src/tools/write-tools.ts","mcp-servers/state-manager/src/tools/write-tools.test.ts","mcp-servers/state-manager/src/__tests__/workflow-transition-idempotency.test.ts","hooks/professional-mode-guard.sh","hooks/tests/test-review-lifecycle-guards.sh","hooks/tests/test-workflow-transition-idempotency.sh","skills/executing-plans/SKILL.md","skills/code-review/SKILL.md"];for(const f of files){const a=path.join("worker",f),b=path.join(root,f);if(!fs.readFileSync(a).equals(fs.readFileSync(b)))throw new Error(`mismatch: ${f}`);console.log(`${sha(a)}  ${f}`)}console.log("EXPECTED_RUNTIME="+JSON.stringify({plugin_root:root,plugin_version:v,manifest_sha256:sha(path.join(root,".codex-plugin/plugin.json")),bundle_sha256:sha(path.join(root,"mcp-servers/state-manager/dist/index.js")),client:"codex"}))'
steps.expected: Every pair exact; one SHA-256 per path; one complete EXPECTED_RUNTIME JSON.

steps.command: git add worker/mcp-servers/state-manager/src/state-machine.ts worker/mcp-servers/state-manager/src/tools/write-tools.ts worker/mcp-servers/state-manager/src/tools/write-tools.test.ts worker/mcp-servers/state-manager/src/__tests__/workflow-transition-idempotency.test.ts worker/hooks/professional-mode-guard.sh worker/hooks/tests/test-review-lifecycle-guards.sh worker/hooks/tests/test-workflow-transition-idempotency.sh worker/skills/executing-plans/SKILL.md worker/skills/code-review/SKILL.md commander/tests/test_executing_plans_skill.py commander/tests/test_code_review_skill.py worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json worker/mcp-servers/state-manager/dist/index.js
steps.expected: Exact files staged; no commit or push.

steps.description: Record get_resume_state; fully quit/relaunch Codex; reopen native task 019f7742-abd8-7c62-af7b-fe07189f1ffd; require new skill locator; call get_resume_state({}) and run_diagnostics({expected_runtime:<exact printed EXPECTED_RUNTIME JSON>}).
steps.expected: Same ID/mode/plan/Task1 in_progress; 13/13; client/root/version/manifest/bundle hashes exact. New task recovery-only.

steps.description: Executor boundary after staging/restart: Task1 has no in-progress sibling; call submit_task({task_id:1}) once and require review_ready:true plus exact executing-to-reviewing changed:true/same ID/exact submitted batch/gate. In strict read-only reviewing, run git status --short and cat worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json; require pass. Run git add --dry-run worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json; require BLOCKED — COMMAND NOT ALLOWED DURING REVIEW and unchanged index. Do not invoke npm in reviewing. Require successful verdict persistence. For A/B, preflight reviewing and call mark_executing({}) once, requiring exact reviewing-to-executing changed:true/same ID. C/D/F instead atomically reopens Task1 for fix/rerun/resubmit without mark_executing.
steps.expected: Corrected live boundary passes; verdict or transition mismatch fails closed and blocks Task2.

tasks.name: Record durable Wave 1R evidence
tasks.description: No new tests required: evidence-only task reruns focused gates and records runtime, identity, lifecycle, rollback, guard, parity, full-suite, roadmap, and no-commit/no-push evidence without later-feature claims.

steps.description: Record stale-process correction; Wave0 MP-W01-MP-W07/MP-W09/MP-W10 completed prerequisites protected by named executing-plans tests; same native ID and MP-W11; exact cache/skill locators/manifest/client/hashes/13 diagnostics; sequential/two-task-parallel submission semantics; Task1 submit/return; strict read-only code review; combined guards; transaction-local validation and complete rollback matrix; empty rejection/informational neutrality; pre/post-build suites; plugin/parity; exact roadmap disposition: W2 MP-001/002/011/012/D04/C01; W3 MP-003/006/D01/D05/D10; W4 MP-004/007/009/010/C02/C03; W5 MP-005/008/D02/D03/D06/D07/C04; W6 D08/D09/C05; W7-W9 named queued defects; W10 C06; W11 create_plan hardening; W12 MP-013/014/C07; W13 all active requirements emphasizing D08; no commit/push/later-feature completion.
steps.expected: Complete evidence contract with no missing or silently moved active requirement ID.

steps.command: npm --prefix worker/mcp-servers/state-manager test -- src/tools/write-tools.test.ts src/__tests__/workflow-transition-idempotency.test.ts src/__tests__/runtime-fingerprint.test.ts src/__tests__/run-diagnostics.test.ts src/__tests__/session-identity.test.ts src/__tests__/tool-dispatch.test.ts
